outline.title: INEC Platform: 20 Next-Generation Innovations
outline.summary: Title slide introducing the 20 innovations in the Digital Twin Simulation and Candidate Campaign Planning modules for the INEC Platform.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: The Challenge: Elections at Scale Demand Predictive Intelligence
outline.summary: Highlights the logistical complexity of managing nationwide elections in Nigeria and the need for proactive, data-driven decision-making tools.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Architecture Overview: Two Production-Grade Microservices
outline.summary: Provides an overview of the two Python microservices, their lines of code, endpoints, and WebSocket capabilities.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Digital Twin Innovation 1: Monte Carlo Forecasting Eliminates Guesswork
outline.summary: Explains the 1,000-run Monte Carlo engine that generates probability distributions for turnout and vote shares.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Digital Twin Innovation 2: Four-Scenario Parallel Branching Prepares INEC for Any Outcome
outline.summary: Details the simultaneous simulation of Baseline, Optimistic, Pessimistic, and Crisis scenarios for contingency planning.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Digital Twin Innovation 3 & 4: Disruption Modeling Quantifies the Unquantifiable
outline.summary: Describes how weather events and adversarial attacks are modeled to calculate precise turnout suppression percentages.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Digital Twin Innovation 5 & 6: AI and Live Data Close the Prediction Gap
outline.summary: Covers the natural-language What-If generator and real-time calibration from live turnout data.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Digital Twin Innovation 7, 8, 9 & 10: From Simulation to Operational Intelligence
outline.summary: Summarizes geospatial exports, agent-based crowd modeling, certification timelines, and supply chain simulation.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Campaign Planning Innovation 1: AI Speech Writer Speaks to Every Nigerian
outline.summary: Explains the LLM-backed speech engine generating culturally resonant materials in multiple languages.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Campaign Planning Innovation 2 & 3: Data-Driven Targeting Replaces Guesswork
outline.summary: Details ward-level swing analysis and opponent vulnerability scanning for scientific campaign strategy.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Campaign Planning Innovation 4 & 5: Optimising Money and Movement
outline.summary: Covers the 4-tier fundraising model and the TSP route optimizer for canvassing efficiency.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Campaign Planning Innovation 6 & 7: Real-Time Performance Intelligence
outline.summary: Describes live debate performance scoring and volunteer network graph analysis.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Campaign Planning Innovation 8, 9 & 10: The Complete Campaign Command Center
outline.summary: Summarizes policy resonance mapping, GRP-optimized media buying, and the live war room dashboard.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Combined Impact: A Platform Built for the Future of Democracy
outline.summary: Highlights the overall impact of the 20 innovations, transforming INEC into a proactive guardian of democratic integrity.

outline.title: Conclusion: Production-Ready, Validated, and Deployed
outline.summary: Confirms that both modules are syntax-validated, Docker-containerized, and ready for immediate deployment on the main branch.
